subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One was walking in the house and observing all things and whatsoever lay hidden therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کان المظلوم ما شیا فی البیت و ناظرا فی الاشیاء و ما کان مستورا فیها من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
